//AllowedOrigins: CORS origins for the frontends that call this API. Local dev ports for the separately-served frontends are listed here; production origins (GitHub Pages, subdomains) are added via configuration/env on the host (see DEPLOYMENT.md).
//AllowedOrigins-capacitor: The packaged Android/iOS apps run inside a Capacitor WebView whose origin is localhost (https on Android by default, capacitor:// on iOS), not the deployed site. Without these, every API call from a native app fails CORS and multiplayer breaks (#34). These are fixed scheme/host values, not deployment-specific, so they live in the base config alongside the dev ports.
